prompt:
Somebody (fine: me) rebased the annotations-cleanup branch onto main last night and now the dashboard's mapkit module won't load at all. First failure in CI:

  SyntaxError [ERR_INVALID_TYPESCRIPT_SYNTAX]: Expected '>', got ','

which I find rich, because the line it frames has commas that have been there forever. I poked at it for twenty minutes, moved a comma, made it angrier, and put the comma back. I have a suspicion the rebase chewed more than one spot but I can't prove it since node bails on the first complaint.

None of the rollup behaviour is in question — counts, groupings, leaderboard order, all pinned by node --test test_mapkit.ts and all correct before the rebase. Repair the module so it parses and the suite is green. Minimal edits please: no reformatting sweep, no rewriting helpers into different shapes, and the test file is off limits.
